name: Whole Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove gills and clean the inside and outside of the fish.
2. Pat the fish dry with paper towels.
3. Place the fish on a piece of heavy foil.
4. Stuff the innards of the fish with sliced potatoes, onions, and lemon slices (these will absorb the oil in the fish and can be discarded).
5. Pour 1 cup (or as needed for the size of the fish) Chablis over the fish.
6. Close the foil tightly around the fish.
7. Bake at 350°F or grill until the fish just begins to flake.
